phase: Phase 16 of ledger system buildout — first Page Ledger
purpose: Dossier / read surface for Box data — Client Boxes (28), Staff Boxes (10), orchestrator state HTML. The operator's window into Box content + completeness + freshness + recommended action.
data_sources: Auto/Client Boxes/<Name>/ (28 client folders, canonical per SoT §3.1)

apis.purpose: List all boxes with completeness + grouping
Pre-rendered orchestrator state HTML for the box

writes_side_effects.future_status_flip: if direct edits are ever introduced, page status flips from generated-view to source-editing and risk re-evaluates

client_truth_ordering_per_sot_3_1.rendered: NOT YET UI-BOUND — known gap; future second comms tab
read by server for parsing; not directly rendered
plan section — STRATEGY DRAFT, never truth

hard_rules_on_this_page: Profile + enrichment sections must be visually labeled 'internal' — renderer phrases enrichment as 'operationally usable context vs protected/off-limits context' (per 2026-04-27 lead-dossier mode pass)
Plan section must be visually labeled 'strategy draft'
Page must obey SOURCE_OF_TRUTH §3.1 + Allowed-To-Know §4 schema

primary: Unified section nav (state/profile/comms/enrichment/7-day plan/agents/logic) inside one panel
In-site dossier reader (boxes-md-rich markdown-first renderer with design-kit cards + admonition styling)
Right-click context menu (section text/name copy, send-to-delegations, Open as Intake Report)
Mismatch diagnostics (unlinked box folders + people missing canonical boxes)
Page-card launcher mode (html in-panel as native pages)

supported_states.render: grid grouped by class with completeness color-coding
focused-pair view; roster hidden behind back action

page_specific_guardrails: Profile / enrichment sections are internal-only. Never render in a way that reads as customer-facing.
Plan sections are strategy drafts. Never imply the plan is what will happen. Reply gate + frequency cap + calendar reality must be visible.

Right-click → Delegations can route section text to a customer-facing channel. The Delegations page applies its own guardrails. This page is responsible for not silently embellishing what the operator chose to send.
Mismatch diagnostics are warnings, not errors.
Verbatim comms (01b_comms_verbatim.md) is rank-2 source-of-truth but NOT YET UI-bound. Operator must know that 01_comms.md (rank 4) is what's rendered. Sunsets when verbatim binding lands.
page_done_gate_required_checks: all DoD §5.3 boxes (route still maps, asset ownership updated, etc.)
page_asset_sitemap.md §boxes updated (Asset Ownership / Change Checklist / History / Last Verified)
if dossier renderer changed: spot-checked against ≥3 client boxes (1 specialized + 2 generic)
if new specialized renderer added: registered in BoxesScreen + documented in BOX_LEDGER per-Client conventions + added to Asset/Widget Map §3.5
if new section in section-nav added: server-side /api/boxes/<id> returns it, mission_control_loader hydrates it, mismatch diagnostics still parse cleanly
if new right-click action added: cross-referenced in Asset/Widget Map §3.3 + Delegations sitemap
if completeness scoring logic changed: spot-checked against ≥1 thin + ≥1 partial + ≥1 strong box
cache-busters bumped in Secretary.html for any touched JS/CSS

open_page_problems.detail: 01b_comms_verbatim.md exists in every box (582 raw payloads as of 2026-04-28); page renders 01_comms.md only; future second comms tab
open_page_problems.impact: rank-2 source-of-truth content is invisible to the operator on this page right now

open_page_problems.problem: Specialized renderers exist for 2 of 28 client boxes
open_page_problems.detail: Hugo + Brenda have custom layouts; other 26 use generic boxes-md-rich
open_page_problems.note: not a defect — but the specialized pattern doesn't scale by default

open_page_problems.detail: schema landed in SOURCE_OF_TRUTH §4.2; per-Box allowed_to_use.json files don't exist yet; Boxes page doesn't honor 4-bucket model in profile/enrichment rendering
open_page_problems.next_action: author allowed_to_use.json for Hugo Casillas first; renderer labels sections by bucket

open_page_problems.remaining_gap: operators still have to read the labels

open_page_problems.detail: Box where plan was authored 4 days ago and client replied 1 day ago should visually indicate plan-stale state. Today's renderer relies on operator catching this from cadence + last-inbound timestamps. More explicit stale-plan banner is future work.

recent_changes_narrative_2026_04_29: Phase 1 Intake → Box unification — right-click → Open as Intake Report →; selectId prop wires reverse handoff. Two-canonical-surfaces problem resolved (Box Reports synthesized per DEC-2026-04-29-005; one identity per Box per DEC-2026-04-29-006; refresh on read per DEC-2026-04-29-007). Cache-busts: screens.jsx 94→95, app.jsx 52→53.
recent_changes_narrative_2026_04_28: Verbatim comms backfill — all 28 boxes received 01b_comms_verbatim.md + comms/*.json (582 raw payloads). Page does not yet render verbatim file; rank-2 SoT not reachable from this page until second comms tab lands.
recent_changes_narrative_2026_04_27: Why specialized renderers exist (Hugo + Brenda) — first two boxes to receive deep attention revealed generic markdown-dump didn't surface right facts at right altitude. Pattern is reusable but not auto-applied.
Markdown-dump → design-kit narrative renderer — boxes-md-rich. Sections now visually carry their type (canonical/strategy/internal/generated), making §9 page-specific guardrails enforceable.
Completeness scoring (thin/partial/strong) — without this, operator couldn't tell at a glance which boxes were ready vs nominally populated but actually thin.

Lead-dossier mode (focused navigation) — roster hides after selection. Section model expanded to state/comms/profile/enrichment/7-day plan/agents/logic. Enrichment phrased as 'operationally usable context vs protected/off-limits context' — language convention that operationalizes Allowed-To-Know boundary BEFORE the schema landed.
Initial runtime + layout simplification — first boxes runtime pass (direct Auto-source APIs, top-level Boxes page); second pass merged nav + content into single panel.

architectural_rationale.because: canonical truth lives in Auto/Client Boxes/<Name>/ written by orchestrator scripts. Letting the page edit canonical files would create drift surface. Per DEC-2026-04-29-005, synthesized views beat copies.

architectural_rationale.why: section model is unified instead of tabs
architectural_rationale.because: operator scrolling beats operator clicking when reading a dossier. Tabs hide content; vertical reading reveals it. Horizontal rails reserved for compact checklist nav.

architectural_rationale.why: specialized renderers are opt-in instead of default
architectural_rationale.because: authoring a specialized layout is real work. Reserving for high-altitude / high-touch boxes means the work earns its keep. As more boxes need specialized handling (e.g., once Allowed-To-Know rendering is wired), the pattern can scale.
formal completeness is moving target. Heuristic scoring with thin/partial/strong gives operator useful signal without precision the data doesn't support.

architectural_rationale.why: page is in the 'shining star' arc
architectural_rationale.because: per Jake's stated direction, Boxes will be the canonical surface for the project's eventual reactive-network architecture (DEC-2026-04-29-013). When Phase C runtime lands, every Client Box will be a runtime Box. This page is the operator's window into that.

near_term: Wire 01b_comms_verbatim.md as second comms tab — closes rank-2-not-rendered gap
Author allowed_to_use.json for Hugo Casillas as first per-Box AtK instance; renderer labels sections by bucket
Add explicit plan-stale banner when reply-after-plan is detected
medium_term_phase_b: Boxes-page steward agent audits each box's render output against source files weekly
Per-Box specialized renderer registry — codify pattern so adding new specialized renderer is one-file change
long_term_phase_c: Each Client Box becomes runtime Box with box.json manifest
Page becomes operator's window into live network: subscription events, propagation receipts, per-Box steward run summaries
Manifest stub gate from DoD §5.7 becomes hard-enforced for any Box rendered here

related_ledgers.box_wire_shape: BOX_BUS_LEDGER.md §2.1 (manifest schema; §7 worked example is Hugo Casillas)

history.event: Phase 16 — initial creation. First Page Ledger. 16-section deep-memory record covering purpose, use case, route+render ownership, data sources, APIs, writes/side effects, SoT rules, widgets, supported states, page-specific guardrails, local-stricter Done Gate, open problems, narrative recent changes, architectural rationale, related ledgers, future direction. Tier: domain. Cross-references sitemap as canonical. Companion files: boxes.json, LEDGERS/PAGES/_README.md (directory orientation). Companion Communications entry: COMM-2026-04-29-013.
